Hero.title: Elevating Vietnamese Agriculture to Global Standards
Hero.subtitle: VIETNAMESE AGRICULTURE - INTERNATIONAL QUALITY
Hero.description: Pioneering the creation of a leading sustainable high-tech agricultural and seafood production, processing, and export ecosystem in Vietnam.

About.subtitle: Overview
About.title: Empowering the World with Safe, Traceable Food
About.desc: Reshaping the value of the high-tech agricultural supply chain. Minh Phuong is committed to providing quality agricultural and seafood products with transparent traceability from farm to table.
About.quality_desc: Meeting all the strictest global standards.
About.transparency_desc: Open processes, 100% traceability across the entire chain.
About.sustainability_desc: Focusing on ESG and an ecological circular agriculture system.

Facilities.subtitle: Capacity & Tech
Facilities.title: World-class Manufacturing Infrastructure
Facilities.desc: 5 advanced factories operating on Kaizen standards with modern automatic BQF/IQF lines.
Facilities.seafood_desc: Specializing in frozen shrimp processing and sophisticated deep-processed products matching Japanese standards.
Facilities.fruit_desc: Ultra-fast BQF/IQF technology and premium thermal drying, preserving natural vitality perfectly.
Facilities.coffee_desc: Automatic optical sorting lines & roasting systems tailored for US/EU export standards.
Facilities.storage_desc: Independent logistics center with AI-controlled microbiological and precise temperature systems.

Products.subtitle: Catalog
Products.title: Premium Products for Global Demands
Products.desc: 100% source traceability. Diverse product portfolio & commitment to large, stable quantities for B2B markets.

ProductTabs.seafood_desc: Providing a full range from raw shrimp to meticulous deep processing.
ProductTabs.seafood_1_val: Raw fresh shrimp, Nobashi, Butterfly, Easy-peel.
ProductTabs.seafood_2_val: Cooked shrimp, Sushi Ebi, Shrimp rings.
ProductTabs.seafood_3_val: Tempura, Popcorn, Ebi Fry, Filo Rolls, Shrimp patties.
ProductTabs.seafood_4_val: Marinated (Garlic, BBQ, Orange, Parsley, Sweet Chili).
ProductTabs.frozen_desc: Perfectly preserving quality with modern blast freezing lines.
ProductTabs.frozen_2_val: Pineapple, Passion fruit, Jackfruit, Taro, Papaya.
ProductTabs.fresh_desc: Strictly selecting international standard fruits across robust raw material zones.
ProductTabs.fresh_1_val: R2E2 Mango, MD2 Pineapple, Thai Jackfruit, Red Dragon Fruit, Passion Fruit...
ProductTabs.fresh_2_val: EU-US standard dried & soft-dried, preserving perfect chewiness and nutrients.
ProductTabs.coffee_desc: Masterpiece coffee from B'Lao plateau at 1,000m altitude. Rich flavor, supreme export packaging.

SupplyChain.subtitle: Traceability
SupplyChain.title: From Farm to Port - Fully Integrated
SupplyChain.desc: Absolute quality control through a 4-step closed ecosystem covering the entire South and Central Highlands.
SupplyChain.step1_desc: 1200+ Ha of bananas, 500+ Ha of fruit trees. Harvesting at standard brix & full refrigerated truck transport.
SupplyChain.step2_desc: Aseptic closed processing system at 5 high-capacity factory clusters handling tens of thousands of tons.
SupplyChain.step3_desc: Preserving thousands of Pallets with 24/7 automatic temperature control before moving to the seaport.
SupplyChain.step4_desc: Delivering flawlessly as committed (Ocean/Air) to the global market, flexible and precise.

ESG.subtitle: Vision 2030
ESG.title: Innovating for a Sustainable Future
ESG.desc: Targeting $100 million/year in agricultural & seafood export revenue. We are building a solid foundation for the environment and long-term reputation on the world map.
ESG.blockchain_desc: Agriculture 4.0 with transparent trajectory of each fruit to the customer's hands.
ESG.lowemission_desc: Strongly deploying low-emission strategies and UN-standard ESG reporting.

Contact.title: Ready to Elevate Your Supply Chain?
Contact.desc: Contact our Export Sales team. Your quote request will be provided with in-depth consultation and response within 24 hours.
Contact.org_val: MINH PHUONG PRODUCTION, IMPORT-EXPORT AND TRADING SERVICES CO., LTD

Stats.title: Scale & Capacity at a Glance
Stats.desc: A solid foundation to meet all global supply chain demands.
